2388700.name: Megacobra vs Sharkbat
2388700.description:
A tribute to cheesy and steamy action movies of the 1980s/1990s.

Take on the role of a seasoned commander leading a militia in a civil war that has erupted in the modern-day United States.
A classified government experiment gone wrong, a sloppy mishandling of top secret documents and a country divided in two have formed the perfect storm for a hellish scenario.
It wasn't long until both sides of the conflict figured a way to weaponize the experiment's outcome and started deploying it's horrific products.
Mutated giant snakes and shark/bat hybrids are no longer the stuff of fiction.
The only question now is who will prevail.

Are you ready to lead your militia to victory and restore order to a war-torn America?

Features

  • Strategy layer featuring base building, equipment upgrades, unit promotions, beast evolution
  • Fast-paced turn based tactics
  • Each mutated species has its unique strengths and weaknesses. The giant snakes excel at long-range attacks and can paralyze enemy units, while the shark/bat hybrids are agile and excel at aerial attacks.
  • Perma Death
  • Permissive character customization. Character visuals are independent of equipment. You can send your units to battle wearing full armor or a bikini, the stats are the same.
  • Optional romantic relationships with your squadmates
2388700.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
